reference: Hello Doctor, for the three weeks, I have been feeling lethargic. I had a blood test that indicated I have an inflamed liver, high cholesterol, and my iron levels were very high. Three weeks ago, I also gave blood, and I have been drained of energy. Tomorrow, I will go for an ultrasound test, as I have been urinating a lot. I am forty-five years old. What do you think it may be? I also completed a urine test to check for a urine infection, but it came back normal.
text: Hello, doctor. For the three weeks, I have been feeling lethargic. I had a blood test that I have an inflamed liver, high cholesterol, and my iron levels were very high. Three weeks ago, I also gave blood, and I have been drained of energy. Tomorrow, I will go for an ultrasound test. As I have been urinating a lot, I am 45 years old. What do you think it may be? I also completed a urine test to check for a urine infection, but it came back normal.
